decisions.decision: Implement `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` as a new additive account read model beside `/exposure`, using the standard `{account, meta}` envelope and returning the rows directly at `account.positions`.
alternatives_rejected: Replace `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure` and force a client migration in the same task.
Introduce a different wrapper such as a top-level `positions` object or nested `account.positions.positions`.

decisions.decision: Define 'open positions' from the existing live `ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE` projection, preserve the current lexical `(marketId, outcomeId)` ordering, and keep the same `404 account_not_found` behavior when the account is missing or its live rows have been fully pruned.
alternatives_rejected: Return `200` with an empty list for missing or fully pruned exposure accounts.
Use recency ordering or another client-facing sort order on the wire.
Invent a separate historical position store for resolved or closed rows.

decisions.decision: Keep the wire row shape narrowly aligned to the task by serializing each open position with `marketId`, `outcomeId`, `netSize`, `lastTradePrice`, and computed `unrealizedPnl`, instead of reusing the richer `/exposure` row contract.
alternatives_rejected: Reuse the full exposure row shape including `absSize`, `updatedAt`, `lastOrderId`, and `lastCommandId`.
Add account-level position metadata that is not required by the task.

decisions.decision: Compute `unrealizedPnl` at read time by replaying accepted EventTrade orders per `(accountId, marketId, outcomeId)` slice with signed average-cost basis handling for multi-fill builds, partial close-outs, and sign flips, then mark the surviving net position to the current atomic inference probability.
alternatives_rejected: Derive P&L directly from `netSize` and `lastTradePrice` alone.
Switch to FIFO or LIFO lot accounting for this task.
Persist extra cost-basis fields into `ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE` as part of the route rollout.

steps.task: Extend the public account-read surface in `backend/server.py` by adding `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` to the service index, route dispatcher, and a dedicated `get_account_positions(account_id)` entrypoint that mirrors the existing account `{account, meta}` response pattern.

Add positions serializers on top of `ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE` that filter out rounded-zero rows, sort surviving rows lexically by `(marketId, outcomeId)`, and emit only the requested position fields while preserving the existing 404-on-empty lifecycle.

Implement read-time EventTrade replay helpers that scan filled `ORDERS` for each live position, maintain signed average-cost basis across buys, sells, partial offsets, and sign flips, and compute `unrealizedPnl` against `query_market_atomic_probability_for_inference(...)` for the current mark.

Add backend regressions in `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` for the new service-index route, successful `GET /v1/accounts/{id}/positions` responses, deterministic ordering, missing-or-pruned account 404s, and representative P&L cases including multi-fill accumulation, partial close, and sign-flip survivors.
Run the targeted backend tests for the new route and exposure/P&L scenarios, review the resulting diff for contract consistency, and commit the completed implementation once the regressions pass.
